Keyboard Shortcuts
Open URLBlast Ctrl+Shift+Y
Copy all URLs (background) Ctrl+Shift+U

About

URLBlast v1.0.0

A powerful tab & URL manager for Chromium browsers.

Manifest V3 · Privacy First · No data collected
